zh.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Berkeley於1394年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾拉格藍時，他的父親Sir James Berkeley39歲，母親Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan36歲。他於1410年4月9日與Isabelle de Mowbray在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1463年10月22日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Berkeley于1394年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾拉格藍时，他的父亲Sir James Berkeley39岁，母亲Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan36岁。他于1410年4月9日与Isabelle de Mowbray在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1463年10月22日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Berkeley was born in 1394, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Sir James Berkeley, was 39 and his mother, Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan, was 36. He married Isabelle de Mowbray on 9 April 1410, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 October 1463, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Berkeley est né en 1394, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Sir James Berkeley, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Mowbray le 9 avril 1410, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 octobre 1463, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Isabelle de Mowbray il 9 aprile 1410, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Berkeleyが1394年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランで生まれた時，父Sir James Berkeleyは39歳，母Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglanは36歳であった。1410年4月9日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでIsabelle de Mowbrayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1463年10月22日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントウッドネスボロウスト. マリー ス バージン チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Berkel: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 우드네스버루그h 스트. 메리 테 버긴 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Berkeley(이)가 1394년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Berkeley(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1410년 4월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Isabelle de Mowbray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1463년 10월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 우드네스버루그h 스트. 메리 테 버긴 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Berkeley nasceu em 1394, em Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir James Berkeley, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Mowbray em 9 de abril de 1410, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1463, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Berkel: ст. мэри т виргин чурчярд, вуднесбороую, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Berkeley родился в 1394 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir James Berkeley было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Bluet Heiress of Raglan, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Mowbray 9 апреля 1410 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 октября 1463 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ст. мэри т виргин чурчярд, вуднесбороую, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Isabelle de Mowbray el 9 de abril de 1410, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1463, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
